'''''Protector''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]].

==History==
Harkov's involvement in the development of the [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] made ''Protector'' one of the first ships to have received the new [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

[[File:Protector.jpg|thumb|left|''Protector'' during the [[Sepan Civil War]]]]

The ''Protector'' served various duties, such as the command ship of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] forces in the [[Sepan system/Legends|Sepan system]] during the [[Sepan Civil War]] as well as escorting convoys carrying construction supplies and equipment secretly headed to the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] as was discovered by Rebel pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]. It was involved in Harkov's defection and evaded capture for a short time after the Admiral's demise. Eventually ''Protector'' was hunted down by Imperial forces. Despite assistance from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], in the form of the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] [[Warhawk (MC40a light cruiser)|''Warhawk'']], and several [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] and [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttles]], and one of [[Harkov]]'s [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]], ''[[Akaga]]'', ''Protector'' was destroyed by Imperial starfighter forces led by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

===Legacy===
A (presumably fictionalized) account of the exploits of the ''Protector'' were recorded in the holo-serial ''[[The Voyages of the VSD Protector]]''. Amongst the accounts related was an encounter with a [[slivilith]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Protector'' is first shown in the [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''TIE Fighter'']] computer game, where it is described and depicted in gameplay as a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. In one cut-scene set during the [[Sepan campaign]], the ''Protector'' appears as an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], due to the footage being recycled from a generic return-to-base scene.

In [[2008]], ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' stated there were three different [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyers]] called ''Protector'' in the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]. Two were used by the Empire : this one and an [[Protector (Victory II-class)|other]], a [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]].
